scenario_name: author skill: frequently-triggered pre-commit skill (tests <50 line budget)
prompt: Read docs/plugin-guide/skills.md and docs/plugin-guide/skill-design.md for reference, then create a pre-commit check skill that runs before every commit. It should check for secrets, lint errors, and test coverage. This is a frequently-triggered skill so keep it lean — offload heavy logic to scripts/ or references/ as appropriate. Put it in .claude/skills/pre-commit/SKILL.md
